title: Repealed
doc_html:
CHAPTER 5--OF PARENTAL AUTHORITY

SECTION 1--OF THE DUTIES OF PARENTS TOWARDS THEIR

LEGITIMATE CHILDREN, AND OF THE DUTIES OF LEGITIMATE

CHILDREN TOWARDS THEIR PARENTS

Art. 215. Repealed by Acts 2015, No. 260, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2016.
